modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to check student access history in D2L.

full_description_text:
- El usuario desea saber cuándo un estudiante accedió a la información en D2L.  
- También pregunta si es posible ver el progreso del curso de sus estudiantes.  
- La consulta se realiza en el contexto de un curso específico en D2L.
